languages.text: "Любой обман врагов Человечества — благо. Ты не обязан верить в то, что говоришь".
"Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."
languages.original_text: "Любой обман врагов Человечества — благо. Ты не обязан верить в то, что говоришь".

traits.locale_text: "Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."
"Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."
"Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."
"Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."
"Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."
"Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."

languages.text: "Jede Täuschung der Feinde der Menschheit ist eine Tugend. Eure Worte müssen Euch nicht ernst sein."
languages.original_text: "Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."

traits.locale_text: "Jede Täuschung der Feinde der Menschheit ist eine Tugend. Eure Worte müssen Euch nicht ernst sein."

languages.text: « Toute tromperie ciblant des ennemis de l'humanité est considérée comme vertueuse. Vos paroles n'ont pas besoin d'avoir un fond de vérité. »
languages.original_text: "Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."

traits.locale_text: « Toute tromperie ciblant des ennemis de l'humanité est considérée comme vertueuse. Vos paroles n'ont pas besoin d'avoir un fond de vérité. »

languages.text: «Todo engaño de los enemigos de la humanidad es una virtud. No tiene por qué ser sincero al decirlo».
languages.original_text: "Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."

traits.locale_text: «Todo engaño de los enemigos de la humanidad es una virtud. No tiene por qué ser sincero al decirlo».

languages.text: "İnsanlığın düşmanlarını aldatmak erdemdir. Söylediklerinde samimi olmak zorunda değilsin."
languages.original_text: "Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlığın düşmanlarını aldatmak erdemdir. Söylediklerinde samimi olmak zorunda değilsin."

languages.text: “对人类之敌使诈，本身就是一种美德。这些话你无须发自真心。”
languages.original_text: "Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."

traits.locale_text: “对人类之敌使诈，本身就是一种美德。这些话你无须发自真心。”

languages.text: 「人類の敵を欺くことは、いかなるものであれ美徳だ。言葉に本心を込める必要はない」
languages.original_text: "Any deception of the enemies of Humanity is a virtue. You don't have to mean the words."

traits.locale_text: 「人類の敵を欺くことは、いかなるものであれ美徳だ。言葉に本心を込める必要はない」
